privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json. The task is a GIMP layer duplication exercise that downloads flower images from real Unsplash sources (photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e and photo-1426604966848-d7adac402bff, both verified as valid 97-141KB JPEG images) with fallback to synthetic ImageMagick-generated image. The task requires creating a two-layer XCF file verified through XCF magic bytes ('gimp xcf') and layer indicators ('Background' and 'copy' strings) in the binary structure.
